description: Full 100K steps TAM + OEST* peripheral distribution training for OOD robustness. Combines TAM mining with energy-barrier loss between ID and near-OOD peripheral samples.
notes: Full 100K training with TAM mining + OEST* peripheral distribution loss (Ming et al., arXiv:2412.03058). Energy-barrier loss trains E(peripheral) > E(ID) to improve OOD robustness. Peripheral samples generated by reducing diagonal regularization from 0.5*I toward 0.1*I (bridging ID-OOD gap). Compare against q225 TAM-CTL baseline (OOD MSE ~0.2135).
